mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.code, r.name, r.description, r.sort_order, r.status, r.created_at, r.updated_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_role_permission WHERE role_id = r.id) as permission_count FROM sys_role r ORDER BY r.sort_order ASC

SELECT r.id, r.code, r.name, r.description, r.sort_order, r.status, r.created_at, r.updated_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_role_permission WHERE role_id = r.id) as permission_count FROM sys_role r WHERE r.status = #{status} ORDER BY r.sort_order ASC

SELECT r.id, r.code, r.name, r.description, r.sort_order, r.status, r.created_at, r.updated_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_role_permission WHERE role_id = r.id) as permission_count FROM sys_role r WHERE r.id = #{id}

SELECT r.id, r.code, r.name, r.description, r.sort_order, r.status, r.created_at, r.updated_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_role_permission WHERE role_id = r.id) as permission_count FROM sys_role r WHERE r.code = #{code}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role (code, name, description, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_role SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_role WHERE code = #{code}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user_role WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
